FlavorText: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokémon.
It uses the leaf on its head to determine the temperature and humidity. It loves to sunbathe.

Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.
FlavorText: Small hooks on the bottom of its feet catch on walls and ceilings. That is how it can hang from above.
It undertakes photosynthesis with its body, making oxygen. The leaf on its head wilts if it is thirsty.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Slam", "cost": ["Grass", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "20×", "text": "Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.
FlavorText: It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter.
The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.
This wary Pokémon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night.
When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.
The flame on its tail indicates Charmander's life force. If it is healthy, the flame burns brightly.
It has a timid nature. If it is startled, the flames on its back burn more vigorously.

Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.
FlavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Fury Swipes", "cost": ["Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "10×", "text": "Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.
FlavorText: The gas made in its belly burns from its rear end. The fire burns weakly when it feels sick.

Attack_Texts: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.
FlavorText: It blows fire through its nose. When it catches a cold, the fire becomes pitch-black smoke instead.
Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.
While grooming itself, it builds up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs.

Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.
FlavorText: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon's body. Once that happens, it's ready to fight at full power.

Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
FlavorText: It shelters itself in its shell, then strikes back with spouts of water at every opportunity.

Attack_Texts: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.
FlavorText: It is small but rough and tough. It won't hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.
To alert it, the fin on its head senses the flow of water. It has the strength to heft boulders.
Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Water Pulse", "cost": ["Water", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "20", "text": "Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.
FlavorText: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.
It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.
This Pokémon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It's famous for being a hard worker.

FlavorText: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won't be able to resist weeping.

FlavorText: Its nature is to store up electricity. Forests where nests of Pikachu live are dangerous, since the trees are so often struck by lightning.
